primary_field.sample: Cl-treated CdSe_xTe_1-x film fabricated with a 200 nm CdSe underlayer
primary_field.interpretation: source-data-derived PL observation field; not an alloy-composition field

primary_numerical_kernel_sweep.scale_selection_rule: zero plus a half-pixel transition and powers of two through one-sixth of the 24-pixel field width
primary_numerical_kernel_sweep.combined_kernel_interpretation: unknown native instrument kernel convolved with the declared added numerical kernel

variance_estimator.definition: ordinary sample variance of all retained map cells
variance_estimator.mean_subtraction: one map mean at each scale
variance_estimator.sensitivity_detrending: least-squares planar trend removed before smoothing
variance_estimator.mask_policy: fail if any primary-field value is missing or non-finite; do not impute

training_and_holdout.held_out_metric: signed and absolute relative variance-prediction error
training_and_holdout.status: descriptive closure check on deterministic transforms of one raster, not independent predictive validation

fit_parameters: descriptive point variance of the already observed field
covariance_family_diagnostics.fit_loss: unweighted sum of squared log-variance residuals on the four training scales
covariance_family_diagnostics.optimization: deterministic bounded optimization in log-parameter space
covariance_family_diagnostics.primary_gaussian_check: reciprocal variance linearity versus added sigma squared

required_outputs: model-conditioned expected finite-map variance bias at every scale
exact Gaussian quadratic-form covariance of variance estimators across scales
moment-matched effective variance degrees of freedom
comparison with the false independent-pixel and independent-scale covariance
same_raster_dependence.claim_boundary: the covariance calculation evaluates consequences of the fitted descriptive Gaussian model; it is not empirical repeat covariance

central_crop.application: crop the source field first, then repeat the complete primary reflect-mode sweep

synthetic_control.construction: preserve the centered field Fourier amplitudes, impose conjugate-symmetric random phases, inverse transform, and restore the source mean and variance
required_checks: periodic power-spectrum and wrap-mode smoothing-variance identity within numerical tolerance
reflect-mode comparison to expose boundary and phase sensitivity
synthetic_control.interpretation: the control tests whether a reported scale-variance feature follows the power spectrum alone; it is not a semiconductor mechanism model

reporting.supplementary_coordinate_conversion: added sigma multiplied by the source coordinate spacing, explicitly not a native effective PSF or latent physical correlation length
reporting.numerical_precision: binary64 with immutable JSON values serialized to at least 12 significant digits

stop_rules: source archive or admitted member fails immutable hash and structural checks
coordinate or map parsing is ambiguous
any primary-field value is missing or non-finite
the numerical implementation requires changing the frozen scale grid, holdout, field, estimator, or primary edge convention after viewing results
the result can only be presented by relabeling the PL observation as composition or by treating numerical scales as independent physical measurements
